name: Check keyboard navigation and focus states

assertions: mobile menu button is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
mobile cart button is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
cart drawer receives focus on open
Tab stays inside the cart drawer while open
Escape closes the cart drawer and returns focus to a visible control
product quantity input is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
add-to-cart button is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
checkout customer inputs are reachable in logical order and have visible focus

checks.flow: admin login and mobile order detail
assertions: admin token input is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
mobile admin Detail button is reachable by Tab and has visible focus
mobile admin Detail action focuses the order detail panel with visible focus

fixes: Cart drawer close now restores focus only to a visible previous element.
If the previous element is hidden after mobile menu close, focus falls back to the visible cart opener, mobile menu toggle, or home link.
Mobile menu toggle now has a stable data-mobile-navigation-toggle selector for focus return and testing.
Playwright webServer now supplies CASEFLOW_ADMIN_API_TOKEN for admin E2E when no external token is configured.
